name: NextTrip, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview NextTrip, Inc. (the Company, NextTrip, we, us and our) is an early-stage, technology-driven travel company developing an integrated travel booking and media platform designed to connect leisure, group and business travelers to the world. Our travel booking platform is powered by our proprietary NXT2.0 booking engine, which offers extensive inventory, supporting both travelers and distributors with a platform for curating personalized experiences and efficient trip planning and ...
